<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"List calibration runs"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/v1/curves/{indexName}/calibrations"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns calibration run history for the named index, most recent first.

  as={"h2"}
